StyledText.Data: View page items in Title <<TF TT Header::Text>>

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

StyledText.Data: Block and text (click to view page item)
Number of page items found: <<FAT Page item 2::Num of page items>> <<gDisplayExtendedInformation>>

ScriptReference.name: View card Page item IO setting

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (FAT Page item 2::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item 2::IO id array Legacy) And Count (FAT IO Value @ Page item 2::PrimaryKey) = 0 Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item 2::IO enabled
IsEmpty (FAT Page item 2::IO id Legacy) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item 2::IO id array Legacy) And Count (FAT IO Value @ Page item 2::PrimaryKey) = 0 Or Not BlockTemplate @ Page item 2::IO enabled
